title: Exclusive Weapons, Armor and Tools
description: This mod adds a set of upgraded weapons, tools, and armor using the new Super Ore Blocks introduced by SuperOreBlock.
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/EXCLUSIVE_WEAPONS_ARMORS_TOOLS/MP_EXCLUSIVE_WEAPONS_Header.webp) This mod adds a set of upgraded weapons, tools, and armor using the new Super Ore Blocks introduced by **_[SuperOreBlock](https://modrinth.com/mod/superoreblock)_**. These new items are slightly stronger than their vanilla counterparts, offering a natural power boost without becoming overpowered. ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/EXCLUSIVE_WEAPONS_ARMORS_TOOLS/MP_EXCLUSIVE_WEAPONS_Description.webp) Features: - New armor sets made from Super Iron, Super Gold, Super Diamond, and Super Netherite Blocks. - Slightly improved stats compared to regular gear — designed to feel rewarding but balanced. Items are upgraded through the Smithing Table: - Combine a standard item (like an iron chestplate or diamond sword) with the corresponding Super Block to create its enhanced version. This mod is ideal for players looking for an extra tier of gear that fits smoothly into a vanilla-friendly progression system. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/EXCLUSIVE_WEAPONS_ARMORS_TOOLS/MP_EXCLUSIVE_WEAPONS_Faq.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/EXCLUSIVE_WEAPONS_ARMORS_TOOLS/MP_EXCLUSIVE_WEAPONS_Screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SMeShcIT/images/d1521975b7f97a58aae9fbd9a662c09e44ea9962.png) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SMeShcIT/images/e2526f6c686d4d6a19f3cd5d59244290e466e40e.png) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SMeShcIT/images/da88ac6ef1aa5d9cfcb135ca02d0e16f6ba8fd87.png) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
